sections.headline: ENGINEERED SOLUTIONS
sections.subheadline: I build robust systems with predictable outcomes. No magic, just solid engineering.

sections.heading: SPECIFICATIONS
sections.body:
I approach software engineering like mechanical engineering: understand the requirements, design the system, implement with precision, test thoroughly, and document everything.

My background is in distributed systems, infrastructure, and developer tooling. I care about observability, maintainability, and operational excellence. If it can't be measured, it doesn't exist.

Currently based in Seattle, working on infrastructure that powers millions of requests per day.

items.title: MESSAGE QUEUE
items.description: Distributed message queue handling 10M+ messages/day. Exactly-once semantics, dead letter queues, and comprehensive monitoring.

items.title: API GATEWAY
items.description: High-performance API gateway with rate limiting, circuit breaking, and request routing. Handles 50K+ RPS.

items.title: OBSERVABILITY STACK
items.description: Custom observability platform with metrics, traces, and logs. Built on Prometheus, Jaeger, and Elasticsearch.

items.title: CI/CD PIPELINE
items.description: Internal developer platform for automated deployments. GitOps-based with progressive delivery and automated rollback.

items.title: DATABASE MIGRATION
items.description: Zero-downtime migration tool for PostgreSQL. Handles schema changes, data transformation, and rollback safely.

items.title: SERVICE MESH
items.description: Implementation of service mesh for microservices architecture. mTLS, traffic management, and policy enforcement.

sections.heading: INITIATE CONTACT
sections.subheading: Available for consulting and full-time roles
